title: Final Audit Summary
description: Structured stdout of final_audit.py, run at W7 over every converged segment: 2 hard checks (coverage, stale-review) rolled into hard_failures, 4 WARN checks rolled into warnings, a whole-project completeness gate (completeness_counts/project_complete), and a frontback coverage report. The arithmetic rollup invariant hard_failures == coverage_failures + stale_review_failures is enforced procedurally by final_audit.py itself. The project_complete invariant is enforced by this schema: project_complete is true if and only if every one of completeness_counts' five values (not_started, recoverable, stale, blocked_needs_regeneration, human_escalation) is 0 -- i.e. project_complete is true only when EVERY manifest.json segment classifies reusable, zero in every other category.

coverage_failures.description: Count of converged segments that fail the coverage hard check.

stale_review_failures.description: Count of converged segments that fail the stale-review hard check.

hard_failures.description: Rollup invariant (procedurally enforced, not schema-expressible): hard_failures == coverage_failures + stale_review_failures.

warnings.description: Count of WARN-level (non-blocking) check failures across the 4 WARN checks.

project_complete.description: Rollup invariant: project_complete == true if and only if every one of completeness_counts' five values equals 0.

completeness_counts.description: Whole-project completeness gate: classification counts from a full select_segments.py run over the entire manifest.json with no --only-segs restriction.

frontback_coverage.description: UNCONDITIONALLY present as an array -- one entry per manifest frontback[] item. An empty array is used for a plain_text source with no frontmatter; this field is never omitted.

status.description: The matching segment's classification for a translate decision; null for regenerate/omit decisions.

generated_at.description: Timestamp at which final_audit.py produced this summary.
